productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Navy Blue Boat Shoes
description: Style NoteThe classic boat shoe design is given a refined twist in this pair of shoes from U.S. Polo Association. With leather finish, the design combines comfort and class effortlessly. Luxurious and stylish, yet practical and comfortable, this shoe is a great lounge wear option - perfect if you're thinking of taking a vacation or spending your weekend relaxing at a beach house!Product DetailsNavy blue slip-on with stitched detailing at the seams of the toe box, three lace-up, two metal eyelets with leather strips running through it at the centrePadded tongue and innerTPU outsole with square nubs all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
